rule.name: Insecure AsyncStorage for Sensitive Data
rule.rule_desc: Detects storage of values using AsyncStorage, which is unsuitable for secrets.
rule.vuln_desc: AsyncStorage is not intended for sensitive secrets and may expose tokens or credentials on compromised devices.
rule.developer: Store secrets in platform-backed secure storage (Keychain/Keystore wrappers).
rule.reviewer: Verify sensitive values are not persisted in AsyncStorage.

rule.name: WebView JavaScript Enabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects JavaScript-enabled React Native WebView usage.
rule.vuln_desc: Improper WebView restrictions can allow script injection, malicious redirects, or data exfiltration.
rule.developer: Restrict navigation targets and disable JavaScript unless required.
rule.reviewer: Confirm WebView origin allowlist and navigation blocking logic are enforced.

rule.name: Arbitrary External URL Opening
rule.rule_desc: Detects external URL launches that require strict allowlist validation.
rule.vuln_desc: Opening attacker-controlled URLs can trigger phishing, malicious apps, or sensitive action abuse.
rule.developer: Validate URI schemes and host allowlists before opening external URLs.
rule.reviewer: Review URL construction paths and enforce allowlists.

rule.name: Android Cleartext Traffic Enabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects cleartext traffic allowance in Android-side configuration files.
rule.vuln_desc: Allowing cleartext traffic weakens confidentiality and enables man-in-the-middle interception.
rule.developer: Disable cleartext traffic and enforce HTTPS endpoints.
rule.reviewer: Check Android networking policy for cleartext exceptions.

rule.name: ATS Arbitrary Loads Enabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects iOS transport policy relaxation in React Native iOS projects.
rule.vuln_desc: Relaxed ATS controls can permit insecure HTTP traffic and increase interception risk.
rule.developer: Use ATS defaults and limit exceptions to specific trusted domains.
rule.reviewer: Validate ATS exceptions and domain scoping in iOS plist files.
